# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2020-04-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(parameters('storageAccountId'), 'ResourceId'))]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'), 'providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2015-08-31-preview').principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'Storage Blob Data Contributor')]"
      scope: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2020-04-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(parameters('keyVaultId'), 'ResourceId'))]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'), 'providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2018-11-01').principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'Key Vault Secrets Officer')]"
      scope: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2020-04-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(parameters('sqlServerDatabaseRoleId'), 'ResourceId'))]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'), 'providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2018-07-01').principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'SQL DB Contributor')]"
      scope: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName'), '/databases/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
      
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2020-04-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', guid(parameters('cosmosDbAccountId'), 'ResourceId'))]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'), 'providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2015-08-01-preview').principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'DocumentDB Account Contributor')]"
      scope: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
